translation.literal_translation: Bhuman, because of instruction beyond samprasada. (8)
translation.technical_translation: Sutra 1.3.8: Bhuman is identified with supreme Brahman since it is taught beyond the samprasada/prana stage.
translation.interpretive_note: Aphoristic form of the beyond-prana argument.

lexical_notes.contextual_sense: Tracks each block inside the section-level inferential sequence

uncertainty_notes: Curated in contiguous S03 pass with consistent inferential labeling and S04-style structure.
A later philological sweep should revisit bhuma/samprasada nuance and long-compound Sanskrit segmentation.
